notes: 画質 panel + chip polish (2026-06). (1) Quality DROPDOWN was too wide: its shrink-to-fit width was ~358px (the widest non-wrapping row). The content reflows fine, so it's now a tidy fixed 220px (min(220px, 100vw-28px)) on every device — no horizontal scroll. (2) The dropdown could overlap the top buttons: it was anchored to the (shorter) chip's bottom, which sat above the taller buttons. It now drops from the bottom of the whole action ROW (right edge still aligned to the chip), so it clears every button on every device. (3) Removed the v0.0.3-alpha entry from the home-screen 更新履歴 changelog. (4) The 画質 chip now matches the other action buttons' size exactly (same height 29px desktop / 25px phone, .72em font, .18 border, 6px vertical padding; line-height normal so the 🖥 emoji's line box matches) — it reads as one of the toolbar buttons. Verified desktop + phone: chip height == button height, panel 220px in-viewport, no overlap, top row still one line. Builds on v0.0.20.
